name: Easy Spanish Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup canned tomatoes with green chilies (RoTel brand)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion and green pepper in water until tender.
2. Add remaining ingredients to the onion/green pepper mixture.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until rice is cooked (cooking time will vary depending on the type of rice used).
- Long grain brown rice
- Uncle Bens Converted Rice (preferred by daughter)
4. Frequently double the recipe and use the entire can of green chilies (10 oz).
